transcription.text: A new season for soft drinks is here. Open a bottle of Sprite and springtime breaks loose. Sprite, it's a natural. Sprite is light and not too sweet. It's a natural. Open a bottle of Sprite and springtime breaks loose. Sprite has a clean, pure, natural taste. There are no artificial flavorings in Sprite. It's a natural. Next time, make it springtime.
